questions.q: According to a May 2026 ruling, which U.S. federal appeals court restricted abortion access by blocking the mailing of mifepristone?
In May 2026, California announced it will begin allowing police to issue traffic tickets directly to the manufacturers of which type of vehicles?
Louisiana Republicans passed a bill in early May 2026 to eliminate an elected New Orleans court clerk position just days before which exoneree was to take office?
In May 2026, the U.S. warned shipping firms they could face sanctions if they pay tolls to which country for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz?
In early May 2026, police found evidence of an explosive device after a vehicle crashed into a health club in which U.S. state, leaving one dead?
